artifacts.purpose: Configuration, data split, model family, hyperparameters, acceptance criteria, and run command.
Current phase, completion status, best metric, elapsed time, ETA, throughput, and last error.
Tidy longitudinal training progress, completed/total units, percent, ETA, throughput, and validation metrics.
Saved model, feature pipeline, encoders, scalers, and metadata. Must include the best model selected by validation/downstream metric; may include last model for diagnostics.
artifacts.update_frequency: best-model updates and final last-model save

artifacts.purpose: Best model selected by validation or downstream metric; final evaluation should load this by default.
Validation, test, benchmark, subgroup, horizon, calibration, or downstream decision metrics.
Training-instability fallback record: declared fallback model, trigger, fallback metric, primary metric, activation status, and selected handoff model.
artifacts.update_frequency: pilot and final evaluation when training methods are used

artifacts.purpose: Deployable predictions with entity keys, time keys, point estimates, quantiles, probabilities, or scores.
